comment: Triaged supply-chain findings that the audit currently tolerates. Every entry must cite a tracking issue or ADR. Entries WITHOUT a tracking link fail audit. Adding to this file requires CODEOWNER review per .github/CODEOWNERS.

cve.rationale: Transitive via @xenova/transformers (upstream-retired, migration to ruvector-onnx-embeddings-wasm tracked in ADR-121 Phase 4). Browser package does not invoke the vulnerable code path. Re-audit when ADR-121 Phase 4 lands or expires.

lockfile.reason: pnpm-store symlinked shadow entries inside an npm lockfile do not carry SHA-512 integrity hashes. The real integrity is enforced by pnpm in /v3/pnpm-lock.yaml separately.
